# Release v1.3.0

Unified game events: introduces `STATE_CHANGE` as a single event for all state mutations, deprecating `PLAYER_MOVE` and `RESET`.

---

## Changelog

## [1.3.0] - 2026-05-18

### Added

- New `GameEvent.STATE_CHANGE` event emitted by both `savePlayerMove` and `reset` — single subscription point for all state mutations
- `GameEventMap[STATE_CHANGE]` typed with `GameEventPayload`

### Changed

- `savePlayerMove` now also emits `GameEvent.STATE_CHANGE` after `GameEvent.PLAYER_MOVE`
- `reset` now also emits `GameEvent.STATE_CHANGE` after `GameEvent.RESET`
- `GameEvent.PLAYER_MOVE` and `GameEvent.RESET` marked `@deprecated` — use `STATE_CHANGE` instead
- Corresponding `GameEventMap` entries for `PLAYER_MOVE` and `RESET` marked `@deprecated`

[1.3.0]: https://github.com/TenGosc007/t3core/compare/v1.2.1...v1.3.0
